raw_prompt:
The Boss asks for the landed cost of an imported machine (CIF known) into
a named country. The session has NO web search and NO fetch tool - the
duty rate, VAT/GST rate, and any import withholding tax cannot be looked up.
raw_response: DATA UNAVAILABLE. Cannot calculate without official rates from the national customs authority. Variables needed: CIF, HS classification, date, jurisdiction.

content:
The Boss asks for the landed cost of an imported machine (CIF known) into
a named country. The session has NO web search and NO fetch tool - the
duty rate, VAT/GST rate, and any import withholding tax cannot be looked up.
DATA UNAVAILABLE. Cannot calculate without official rates from the national customs authority. Variables needed: CIF, HS classification, date, jurisdiction.
